Solving the Structural AI Power Deficit
Looking for REIT Winners? This ETF Has Them
Medical Properties (MPW) Stock Surprises the Market as Colliers Reiterates Buy Rating

holdings.infoBox: REIT is an equity ETF with a total of 28 individual holdings. The top holdings are Equinix stock at 9.68%, Prologis at 9.10%, Welltower at 8.95%, Simon Property Group at 4.98%, and The Macerich Company at 4.47%.

overview.description: The ALPS Active REIT ETF (REIT) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in real estate equity. The fund is an actively managed ETF that provides exposure to publicly traded equity securities of US REITs. REIT was launched on Feb 25, 2021 and is issued by SS&C.
